name: Zhou Dynasty
note: Late Zhou (Warring States) produced Confucius, Laozi, Mencius, Han Fei — the foundational philosophical schools that would define all subsequent Chinese governance

figures.name: Confucius (Kong Qiu)
figures.significance: Defined the moral and political philosophy that governed China for 2500 years

figures.name: Sun Tzu
figures.significance: Author of The Art of War

figures.name: Laozi
figures.significance: Founder of Taoism; author of the Tao Te Ching
